hero.title: Welding, Tools & Repair.
hero.subtitle: Your 360° service partner in Lörrach. Premium products for industry and trade — with expert advice and fast delivery.

hero.title: Who do you call when the welder dies on Friday afternoon?
hero.subtitle: We are a family-run industrial supplier in Lörrach. Eleven people who pick up the phone, run the workshop, drive the deliveries, and know the catalog by heart.

intents.heading: Tell us what you came for.

part.question: I need a part now.
part.answer: Browse the live shop with stock and pricing. Same-day dispatch on stock items ordered before noon.

repair.question: My tool is broken.
repair.answer: Drop it off in Lörrach or send it in. Diagnosis within 24 hours, most repairs in 48. Loaner equipment available.

swiss.question: I'm shipping to Switzerland.
swiss.answer: We file customs ourselves, pay the duties upfront, and invoice the landed cost. AEO-certified.

catalog.question: I want to read a brand catalog.
catalog.answer: Searchable library of manufacturer brochures, manuals, datasheets and certificates. Read in your browser.

catalogPreview.heading: Read before you buy.
catalogPreview.subheading: Brand catalogs from the manufacturers we carry — searchable, filterable, downloadable.

services.heading: Four things we promise.
services.subheading: Specific commitments — not generic value props. If we miss them, tell us and we will make it right.
services.consulting: On-site consultation in the three-country region. We respond within 4 working hours and visit at your convenience.
services.repair: In-house workshop with loaner equipment. Most repairs back on your bench within 48 hours of drop-off.
services.delivery: Own delivery fleet on daily routes through Lörrach, Basel and Mulhouse. Stock items dispatched same-day before noon.
services.customs: AEO-certified customs status. We file the paperwork, pay the duties, and invoice the landed cost in CHF or EUR.

featured.heading: Recently in the shop
featured.subheading: A live slice of the catalog — stocked, shipped, and serviced in-house.

people.heading: When you call, a person answers.
people.body: We are eleven on the team. The same person you talk to about a quote will recognise your voice when you call about the repair. Meet us on the about page.

featured.name: SWR Lörrach Team
featured.quote: If you cannot find what you need in the shop or the catalog, ring us. We probably keep it on the back shelf.

workshop.heading: We don't auto-respond. A real human reads every email.
workshop.body: Send us a short brief, ring the workshop, or book a consultation. We reply within one working day with a firm answer or the next question we need to ask.

products.sameDayDispatch: Fast delivery with our own fleet
products.feature1Desc: We stock only tested, professional-grade products from leading manufacturers for industrial and trade use.
products.feature2Desc: Our specialists advise you individually — in person in Lörrach, by phone, or by email.
products.feature3Desc: We repair and maintain your tools and machines. Fast, reliable, and handled by our own service team.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.subtitle: The product or page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.

terms.heading: Terms of Sale
terms.intro: These terms of sale apply to all deliveries and services of SWR Handelsgesellschaft mbH, Lörrach.
terms.section1Body: Our deliveries, services and offers are made exclusively on the basis of these General Terms and Conditions. These also apply to all future business relationships, even if they are not expressly agreed again.
terms.section2Body: Our offers are non-binding. A contract is only concluded upon our written order confirmation or upon execution of the delivery.
terms.section3Body: All prices are in euros, net plus statutory VAT. Payments are due within 30 days of the invoice date without deduction.
terms.section4Body: Delivery dates are non-binding unless expressly confirmed in writing as binding. Partial deliveries are permitted.
terms.section5Body: The warranty period is 12 months from the delivery date. Obvious defects must be reported in writing within 8 days of receipt of the goods.
terms.contact: For questions please contact: SWR Handelsgesellschaft mbH, Lörrach — info@swr-loerrach.de

privacy.heading: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Protecting your personal data is of particular concern to us. We therefore process your data exclusively on the basis of the statutory provisions (GDPR, TMG).
privacy.section1Body: The controller within the meaning of the GDPR is SWR Handelsgesellschaft mbH, Lörrach.
privacy.section2Heading: 2. Collection and Processing of Personal Data
privacy.section2Body: We collect and process personal data only to the extent necessary for the fulfilment of the contract or for the implementation of pre-contractual measures.
privacy.section3Body: You have the right to access, rectification, erasure and restriction of processing of your stored personal data, as well as the right to object to processing.

compliance.heading: Compliance
compliance.intro: SWR Handelsgesellschaft mbH is committed to complying with all applicable legal regulations and ethical principles.
compliance.section1Body: All deliveries are subject to the applicable export control regulations of the European Union and the Federal Republic of Germany. We reserve the right to refuse orders that violate these regulations.
compliance.section2Body: For deliveries to Switzerland we handle complete customs clearance. All applicable customs duties and import taxes will be invoiced to the customer.
compliance.section3Body: We do not tolerate any form of corruption or bribery. Our employees are required to report conflicts of interest.

iso.heading: ISO Certification
iso.intro: SWR Handelsgesellschaft mbH is certified to ISO 9001:2015. Our quality management system ensures that all products and services meet the highest quality standards.
iso.section1Body: Our certified quality management system covers all areas of our business — from procurement and warehousing to delivery. Regular internal and external audits ensure continuous improvement.
iso.section2Body: All products we carry come from audited manufacturers and undergo incoming inspection before storage. We only carry products that comply with the relevant European standards.
iso.section3Body: The current certificate can be sent on request. Please contact us by email.

sds.heading: Safety Data Sheets (SDS)
sds.intro: In accordance with EU Regulation (EC) No 1907/2006 (REACH), we provide safety data sheets for all relevant products.
sds.section1Body: Safety data sheets for our products can be requested by email. Please provide the part number or product name.
sds.section2Body: Safety data sheets contain important information on the safe handling, storage and disposal of products. Please read them carefully before use.

imprint.heading: Imprint
imprint.registrationBody: Registered at the local court (Amtsgericht) Freiburg i. Br. under HRB 703221.
imprint.vatBody: VAT ID pursuant to § 27 a of the German VAT Act: available on request.
imprint.disputeBody: The European Commission provides a platform for online dispute resolution (ODR) at https://ec.europa.eu/consumers/odr. We are not obliged nor willing to participate in dispute resolution proceedings before a consumer arbitration board.
imprint.contact: For legal enquiries please contact info@swr-loerrach.de.

about.heading: Quality Connects.
about.subheading: SWR Handelsgesellschaft mbH is your 360° service partner in Lörrach for welding, tools, machines, and safety equipment — with expert consultation, fast delivery, and repair service across Germany, Switzerland, and France.
about.fallbackIntro: SWR Handelsgesellschaft mbH has supplied industry and trade in the three-country region around Lörrach with premium tools, welding equipment, machines, and workplace safety gear for nearly four decades.
about.missionBody: We equip workshops, manufacturers, and tradespeople with professional-grade products — and pair them with the consultation, repair, and customs services that keep operations running.
about.approachBody: Our engineers and application specialists know our assortment inside out. We listen first, then recommend exactly what the job needs — no upselling, no shortcuts.

values.qualityBody: We stock only audited, professional-grade products from leading manufacturers. Every SKU meets the relevant European standards.
values.service360Body: From consultation and delivery to on-site repair and customs clearance — a single partner for the entire lifecycle.
values.partnershipBody: We build relationships that last. Our customers stay because we deliver on what we promise, year after year.

about.ctaHeading: Let's talk about your next project.
about.ctaBody: Whether you need a single quote or a long-term supply agreement, our specialists are ready to help.

contact.heading: Get in Touch
contact.subheading: Talk to our team in Lörrach for quotes, technical consultation, repair requests, or customs advice.
contact.reachOutBody: Phone and email are the fastest way to reach our team during business hours. For urgent repair requests, please call us directly.
contact.consultationBody: Our specialists visit customers throughout the three-country region. Book a consultation and we'll come to you.

auth.registerPending: Your account has been created and is awaiting approval by our team. You will receive an email once your account has been activated.
auth.forgotDescription: Enter the email address on your account and we'll send you a link to set a new password.
auth.forgotSent: If that address is on file, a password-reset email is on its way. Check your inbox.
auth.forgotError: Could not send the reset email.
auth.resetTokenMissing: Reset link is incomplete. Request a new one.

account.heading: My Account
account.changePasswordHint: Leave blank to keep your current password.
account.currentPasswordRequired: Enter your current password to change email or password.

addresses.subheading: Manage the delivery and billing addresses on file for your account.
addresses.empty: You haven't saved any addresses yet.
addresses.countryHint: ISO 2-letter country code (e.g. DE, CH, FR)

checkout.heading: Checkout
checkout.subheading: Confirm your address, choose a delivery method, and place your order.
checkout.saveToAddressBook: Save this address to my address book
checkout.noShippingMethods: No shipping methods are available for this address. Please choose a different address.
checkout.shippingLoadError: We could not retrieve shipping options.
checkout.shippingLoadErrorHint: The shipping service is temporarily unavailable. Please try a different address or contact support.
checkout.authorizationNote: Net 30 days. By placing this order you authorize SWR to invoice your account.

orders.heading: Order History
orders.empty: You have not placed any orders yet.

quotations.emptyHint: When our team prepares a quotation for you, it will appear here so you can review and accept it.

acceptError.already_converted: This quotation has already been accepted.

catalog.subheading: Brand catalogs, price lists, manuals, datasheets, certificates and safety sheets — for every brand we carry. Read in your browser, download, or print.

viewer.notice: PDF is rendered by your browser. Use the download button to save a local copy.

fleet.metaDescription: Track the machines on file for your account — warranty, service history, and one-click repair requests.
fleet.heading: My machine fleet
fleet.subheading: Every machine we have on file for your account, with warranty status and the full service history.

actions.heading: Need something for this machine?
actions.body: Repair, calibration, consumables — start here and we route it to the right person in Lörrach.

log.heading: Maintenance log.
log.subheading: Every visit to the workshop, every on-site service. Documents (when available) link straight into the catalog.
log.empty: No service events on file yet — once a repair, calibration or inspection is logged, it will appear here.

empty.heading: No machines on file yet.
empty.body: Fleet builds itself as we deliver and service equipment for your account. New machines purchased through SWR are registered automatically.

bullets.import: We import your machines from past invoices on request.
bullets.register: Send us a serial number for any machine and we will add it.
bullets.track: Once registered, every service event lands here automatically.

service.metaDescription: Returns, repair cases, and calibration requests — one portal, one status view across your orders and machine fleet.
service.heading: Returns & service
service.subheading: Every return, repair and calibration case on your account — from first request to final resolution, with the same status timeline our workshop uses.

return.title: Send something back
return.body: Start a return against any order with items still within the return window.

repair.title: Open a repair case
repair.body: Log a breakdown or fault for any machine in your fleet — we route it to the right workshop.

inspection.title: Schedule calibration
inspection.body: Request annual calibration, safety inspection, or a service visit.

empty.heading: No service activity yet.
empty.body: When you start a return, open a repair case, or request calibration, it appears here — with live status from our workshop.

timeline.heading: Status timeline.
timeline.subheading: The same state our workshop logs against your case. Newest on top.

awaitingCustomer.heading: We need a decision from you.
awaitingCustomer.body: This case is paused until we hear back. The latest note from our workshop is in the timeline above.

new.metaDescription: Open a return, repair or inspection case against your account.

return.heading: Start a return
return.subheading: Pick the items, tell us why, and attach any photos of the problem. We will pick up the case within one business day.

repair.heading: Open a repair case
repair.subheading: Describe the fault and attach any diagnostic material. We will confirm pickup or drop-off within one business day.

inspection.heading: Request inspection or calibration
inspection.subheading: Schedule an annual calibration, safety check, or preventive service for a machine in your fleet.

new.descriptionHint: Include fault symptoms, when it started, and any steps you have already taken. The more context, the faster we close the case.
new.itemsHint: Only items with a quantity above zero are included in the return.
new.attachmentsHint: Photos of the damage, diagnostic reports, or screenshots all speed up the case. Images and PDFs up to 10 MB each.
new.attachmentsSelectedOne: 1 file selected — add more or submit
new.attachmentsNote: Uploads are attached to the case record. Bytes are not transferred in this preview build — filenames are captured so our team can follow up for full files.
new.errorMissing: Please fill in the description and your name before submitting.

picker.heading: Pick a machine from your fleet
picker.subheading: Tap one of the machines we already have on file. Warranty status, serial, and last service are shown so you can decide in seconds.

empty.heading: No machines registered yet.
empty.body: Your fleet is empty, so there's nothing to pick from. You can still describe the machine manually below, or ask us to import it from a past invoice.

notInFleet.heading: Not in your fleet?
notInFleet.hint: Use this for machines that haven't been registered on your account yet. Brand and model are enough — serial speeds things up if you have it.

orderSection.heading: Returns & service
orderSection.empty: No service cases against this order yet.

machineSection.heading: Open service cases.
machineSection.subheading: Every ticket we have open for this machine, with the same status view our workshop uses.

cart.heading: Your Procurement Cart
cart.subheading: Review technical specifications and quantities before final authorization.
cart.emptyHint: Add items from our catalog to place an authorization order.

csvImport.hint: Two columns: SKU, quantity. First row may be a header.

cart.removedNotice: was removed from the shopping basket.
cart.fetchError: We could not load your cart. Please check your connection and try again.
cart.updateError: Could not update the cart. Please try again.
cart.shippingAndTaxNote: Shipping and tax are calculated in checkout.
cart.legalDisclaimer: By proceeding you agree to the SWR Terms of Sale and General Terms and Conditions.
cart.trustIsoDesc: All components undergo rigorous material testing and structural validation.
cart.trustSupportDesc: Dedicated application engineers are available for technical inquiries.

hub.heading: Beyond the Product.
hub.subheading: Consultation, repair, delivery, and customs clearance — four pillars that keep your operation running. One partner, one point of contact.

consulting.title: Expert Consultation
consulting.shortBody: Tool selection, workflow optimization, and technical application advice from specialists who know our catalog inside out.
consulting.subtitle: Our engineers and application specialists visit your site, analyze your requirements, and recommend exactly what the job needs.
consulting.body1: Choosing the right equipment is rarely straightforward. Welding parameters, tool geometry, safety regulations, and total cost of ownership all factor in — and one wrong decision can cost weeks of production.
consulting.body2: Our team of application specialists has decades of combined experience across welding, machining, and workshop equipment. We visit your site, understand your process, and recommend the exact setup that fits — without upselling.
consulting.body3: Consultation is always free for existing and prospective customers. If you're unsure whether a product is right for your application, ask us first.
consulting.ctaBody: Book a 30-minute consultation and we'll come to you.

repair.title: Service & Repair Portal
repair.shortBody: Tools and machines are critical to your production. Our service team handles repairs and maintenance — fast, reliable, and on-site.
repair.subtitle: Drop off in Lörrach, send it in, or have us pick it up. Diagnostics within 24 hours, most repairs back on your bench in 48.
repair.body1: Downtime is expensive. When a welding machine or power tool fails, every hour matters — which is why our repair workshop is staffed year-round and most repairs are completed within 48 hours.
repair.body2: We service all major brands: welding equipment, power tools, pneumatic tools, and workshop machines. Loaner equipment is available for longer repairs to keep your production moving.
repair.body3: Preventive maintenance contracts are available for high-usage customers. Regular inspection extends service life and prevents unplanned downtime.
repair.ctaBody: Call us for urgent service requests and loaner equipment.

categories.heading: Six categories. One workshop.
categories.subheading: If it's tools, machines, or workshop equipment from a brand we carry, we probably service it. Click any category to start a repair request.

welding.title: MIG, TIG, MMA, plasma
welding.body: Power sources, wire feeders, torches and accessories from Fronius, EWM, Lorch, Esab and more. Calibration on request.

powerTools.title: Cordless and corded
powerTools.body: Drills, grinders, impact drivers, circular saws — Bosch, Makita, Metabo, Fein. Battery diagnostics included.

pneumatic.title: Compressors and air tools
pneumatic.body: Aircraft, Schneider and Atlas Copco compressors, air wrenches, sanders and grinders. Hose and fitting service too.

machines.title: Stationary equipment
machines.body: Drill presses, band saws, bench grinders, fume extractors. We come to you for machines that don't move easily.

measuring.title: Calibration & service
measuring.body: Calipers, micrometers, multimeters and laser measurement tools. Calibration certificates issued on request.

safety.title: Helmets, harnesses, masks
safety.body: Periodic inspection of fall arrest equipment, welding helmets and respirators per legal interval.

dropoff.title: Drop-off
dropoff.body: Bring your tool to Lörrach during opening hours, or schedule a pickup with our delivery fleet.

diagnosis.title: Diagnosis
diagnosis.body: We assess fault and parts availability within 24 hours and quote the repair before any work starts.

repair.title: Repair
repair.body: Approved repairs go straight onto the bench. Most are finished the same day — loaner equipment for longer ones.

pickup.title: Pickup
pickup.body: Collect in Lörrach or have it delivered on our next route. Tested, cleaned, and warrantied.

form.heading: Request a repair
form.subheading: Fill in what you can — we will reply within one working day with diagnosis steps and a transport option.
form.note: Submitting opens your email client with the request pre-filled. Replace the email transport later if you prefer not to use mailto.

delivery.title: Fast Delivery, Own Fleet
delivery.shortBody: We deliver with our own fleet across the Lörrach region and ship nationwide. Same-day dispatch for stock items ordered before noon.
delivery.subtitle: Our own delivery fleet keeps your schedule predictable. Same-day dispatch, transparent tracking, and no third-party surprises.
delivery.body1: We maintain a fleet of delivery vehicles operated by our own drivers — the same people who unload at your facility know our products and can answer questions on the spot.
delivery.body2: Stock items ordered before noon ship same-day. Regional deliveries (Lörrach, Basel, Mulhouse and surrounding areas) typically arrive within 24 hours.
delivery.body3: Nationwide shipments go via established freight partners with full tracking. For urgent projects we offer express delivery options — contact us to coordinate.
delivery.ctaBody: Ask us about scheduled delivery windows and bulk shipping.

customs.title: Swiss Delivery Center
customs.shortBody: Complete customs handling for Swiss customers. We file paperwork, pay duties, and deliver ready-for-use across the border.
customs.subtitle: Lörrach sits 10 minutes from the Swiss border. We turn that geography into a true cross-border service: AEO-cleared, VAT-correct, delivered in CHF or EUR.
customs.body1: Cross-border trade involves tariff codes, preferential origin documentation, VAT recovery, and freight forwarding — any mistake triggers delays or unexpected costs.
customs.body2: For Swiss customers we file all customs declarations ourselves, pay duties upfront, and invoice the landed cost in CHF or EUR. Your shipment arrives as if it were a domestic order.
customs.body3: We hold the AEO (Authorised Economic Operator) status with German customs, which means faster processing and fewer inspections at the border.
customs.ctaBody: We handle the paperwork. You get the goods.

zones.heading: From Lörrach to anywhere in Switzerland.
zones.subheading: Our own fleet handles Basel-area customers. The rest of Switzerland goes via our long-standing forwarder partners with cleared paperwork.

central.regions: BE, SO, LU, ZG, NW, OW

south.regions: TI, VS, GE, VD, NE, JU, FR

zones.disclaimer: Indicative rates for parcels up to 30 kg. Pallet freight, oversized goods and express slots quoted on request.

duties.heading: What customers really pay at the border.
duties.subheading: Approximate Swiss duty + import VAT (8.1%) for typical shop categories. Final amounts depend on tariff classification and origin documents — we file both for you.

tools.note: Most hand tools enter Switzerland duty-free under the EU–CH agreement; only import VAT applies.

machines.note: Duty-free with EUR.1 / supplier declaration of preferential origin, which we issue.

consumables.note: Filler wire and electrodes carry small specific duties depending on alloy class.

ppe.note: Helmets, gloves, harnesses — typically duty-free with origin documentation.

spareParts.note: Original spare parts often qualify for the simplified procedure with same-day clearance.

duties.disclaimer: Indicative figures only — Swiss duty is calculated on weight + value combinations. We provide a binding landed cost on each quote.

filed.heading: Six documents, zero work for you.
filed.subheading: Every Swiss shipment leaves our warehouse with a complete customs file. You sign the order, we handle the rest.

tariff.title: Tariff classification
tariff.body: Correct HS code (Swiss Tares) chosen for every line — no over-declaration, no surprises.

origin.title: EUR.1 / origin declaration
origin.body: Preferential origin paperwork to keep duty-eligible goods truly duty-free.

vat.title: Swiss import VAT
vat.body: Filed and paid upfront via our forwarder; we recover input VAT for German customers separately.

exportDecl.title: German export declaration
exportDecl.body: Atlas export filing on the German side, including reduced-data procedures where allowed.

duties.title: Duties paid (DDP)
duties.body: Delivered Duty Paid is the default — landed cost on the invoice, no border calls for the recipient.

deliveryNote.title: Bilingual delivery note
deliveryNote.body: Delivery and packing list in German and French so the receiving team finds what they ordered.

compliance.heading: Pull declarations from the catalog, not from email.
compliance.subheading: All declarations of conformity, datasheets, safety data sheets and performance declarations live in the catalog and stay versioned by manufacturer.

certificate.title: Declarations of conformity
certificate.body: CE / UKCA declarations from each manufacturer — required for customs and audit files.

datasheet.title: Technical datasheets
datasheet.body: Power, weight, dimensions and standards — what your forwarder and your QA both want to see.

sds.title: Safety data sheets
sds.body: Required for any chemical product crossing the border — filler wire fluxes, lubricants, sprays.

performance.title: Declarations of performance
performance.body: Construction Products Regulation (CPR) declarations for site-installed products.

crossLink.heading: Same fleet, same precision — domestic side.
crossLink.body: If your delivery address is German, you don't need customs at all. Our own fleet covers the Lörrach region same-day and we ship the rest of Germany via parcel and pallet networks.

industries.rangeComingSoon: Our full range for this industry is being added to the catalog — contact us for availability.

hub.heading: Equipment for Every Trade.
hub.subheading: From welding shops to facility maintenance teams — explore our ranges by industry and find the right equipment fast.

weldingHub.title: Welding Hub: machines, gas, consumables.
weldingHub.subtitle: Six welding processes, hundreds of consumables, and a service workshop that knows every machine on this page. Specified for the bench, not the brochure.
weldingHub.body1: Welding is the most service-heavy category we sell. We carry welding stations from Fronius, EWM, Lorch and Esab, with a workshop that calibrates and repairs them on-site.
weldingHub.body2: If you're not sure which process or filler material fits your job, talk to us before you buy — application advice is free, and we'd rather sell you the right machine the first time.

subCategories.heading: Pick the process. Find the machine.
subCategories.subheading: Each process points to the right machines, torches, and consumables in the catalog.

mig.title: Wire-fed for production
mig.body: Fastest deposition rate. Right choice for repetitive structural work in carbon steel, stainless and aluminium.

tig.title: Precision and finish
tig.body: Clean, controlled welds for thin material, stainless, aluminium and exotic alloys. Visible welds and pipework.

mma.title: Stick electrode
mma.body: Rugged and portable. Outdoor work, repair welding, and fieldwork where shielding gas isn't practical.

plasma.title: Cut clean, cut fast
plasma.body: Plasma cutters from 30 A to 200 A for sheet, structural and stainless. Air-cooled and water-cooled options.

spot.title: Sheet metal joining
spot.body: Resistance and stud welders for body shops and sheet metal fabrication.

consumables.title: Wire, rod, gas, tips
consumables.body: Filler wires, electrodes, contact tips, nozzles, gas and PPE. Stocked in Lörrach for next-day pickup.

products.heading: Featured welding equipment
products.subheading: A small slice of the welding range — see the full catalog for hundreds of stations, torches and accessories.

gasTable.heading: Right gas, right amperage.
gasTable.subheading: Quick reference for the most common shielding gases. The catalog has full SDS sheets and regulator pairings.

argon.notes: Inert. Pure argon for almost all TIG work.

argonCo2.notes: Standard mix for spray and short-arc on mild steel.

co2.notes: More penetration, more spatter. Cheaper option for thick structural work.

argonH2.notes: Faster travel speed and brighter arc on stainless.

argonHe.notes: Better penetration on thick aluminium sections.

oxygen.notes: Bottle storage and regulator service available.

gasTable.safetyBody: Cylinder transport, leak testing and regulator service are part of every gas delivery. We refuse to leave a faulty regulator in the field — it's too easy to fix it on the spot.

guides.heading: Guides, datasheets and SDS — all in the catalog.
guides.subheading: Filtered into the document catalog by type. No more chasing PDFs through email.

gasSelection.title: Gas selection guides
gasSelection.body: Manufacturer guides on shielding gas mixes for each process and material.

wirePrep.title: Wire and rod handling
wirePrep.body: Storage, drying and handling of filler wire and stick electrodes — humidity matters.

ppe.title: PPE datasheets
ppe.body: Helmet shade tables, glove ratings, and fume extraction guidance.

currentSettings.title: Manufacturer manuals
currentSettings.body: Operating manuals for our most-used welding stations from Fronius, EWM and Lorch.

catalogRail.heading: Welding documents
catalogRail.subheading: Real catalogs, datasheets and manuals — pulled from manufacturers we represent.

installer.heading: We sell it. We service it.
installer.body: Welding stations don't ship and forget — they need calibration, consumable matching, and the occasional repair. Our certified workshop in Lörrach handles all of it.

calibration.title: Calibration
calibration.body: Power and voltage calibration with certificate, on-site or in the workshop.

loaner.title: Loaner machines
loaner.body: Loaner station while yours is in service so production doesn't stop.

onsite.title: On-site visits
onsite.body: Service van in the Lörrach / Basel region — repairs without shipping the machine.

training.title: Operator training
training.body: Brief operator handover for new machines. Welding-process workshops on request.

welding.title: Welding Technology
welding.shortBody: MIG, TIG, MMA and plasma equipment, filler materials, safety gear, and fume extraction — everything for the welding shop.
welding.subtitle: Welding machines, filler materials, protective equipment, and fume extraction from leading brands.
welding.body1: From hobby-grade MIG welders to heavy industrial TIG stations, we stock welding equipment for every application — with application consultation to match machine and consumables to the job.
welding.body2: Gases, wires, electrodes, protective clothing, and fume extraction systems round out the range. One partner for the entire welding workstation.

tools.title: Hand Tools
tools.shortBody: Professional-grade hand tools for mechanics, fitters, and fabricators — wrenches, screwdrivers, measuring instruments and more.
tools.subtitle: Premium hand tools from trusted manufacturers: wrenches, screwdrivers, pliers, measuring instruments.
tools.body1: Hand tools are the foundation of any workshop. We carry professional-grade brands tested to withstand daily use — with warranty and service support from the manufacturers.
tools.body2: From single tools to complete workshop sets, we help you equip your bench exactly to your workflow.

power-tools.title: Power Tools
power-tools.shortBody: Corded and cordless power tools for construction, metalwork, and assembly — drills, grinders, saws, impact drivers.
power-tools.subtitle: Corded and cordless power tools from leading brands — with repair service and consumables from stock.
power-tools.body1: Drills, impact drivers, grinders, circular saws, and more — we stock the professional ranges from major brands, supported by our own repair workshop.
power-tools.body2: Battery platforms and accessories are available from stock so you can expand your cordless system without compatibility worries.

machines.title: Workshop Machines
machines.shortBody: Bench grinders, drill presses, band saws, and larger fabrication machines — delivered, installed, and serviced.
machines.subtitle: Stationary workshop machines: drill presses, band saws, grinders, and fabrication equipment — delivered and installed.
machines.body1: Workshop machines are a long-term investment. We help with specification, handle delivery and installation, and provide ongoing service through our repair workshop.
machines.body2: Financing and leasing options are available on request for larger capital purchases.

facility-equipment.title: Facility Equipment
facility-equipment.shortBody: Workbenches, storage systems, material handling, and shop floor equipment — build an efficient working environment.
facility-equipment.subtitle: Workbenches, shelving, material handling — turn your shop floor into an efficient working environment.
facility-equipment.body1: A productive workshop starts with the right infrastructure. We plan and supply workbench systems, storage, and material handling equipment tailored to your space.
facility-equipment.body2: On-site consultation is available to design ergonomic, efficient workstations from scratch or optimize existing layouts.

workshop-supplies.title: Workshop Supplies
workshop-supplies.shortBody: Consumables, cleaning, lubricants, adhesives, fasteners — everything the shop uses up every week.
workshop-supplies.subtitle: Consumables, cleaning products, lubricants, and fasteners — keep the shop stocked with one order.
workshop-supplies.body1: The items a workshop runs through every week — consumables, cleaning and maintenance supplies, lubricants, adhesives, and fasteners — all from one supplier.
workshop-supplies.body2: Stock replenishment programs are available for high-volume customers: we monitor usage and deliver before you run out.

occupational-safety.title: Occupational Safety
occupational-safety.shortBody: PPE, safety signage, first aid, and ergonomic equipment — meet your duty of care with professional-grade gear.
occupational-safety.subtitle: Personal protective equipment, signage, first aid, and ergonomics — keep your team safe and compliant.
occupational-safety.body1: Occupational safety is regulated — and the wrong equipment exposes your company to liability. We carry only certified PPE that meets current EU standards.
occupational-safety.body2: Consultation on hazard assessment and PPE selection is available for new customers building out or renewing their safety programs.

partners.heading: Brands we trust. Partners who trust us.
partners.subheading: We work with the leading manufacturers in welding, tools, safety, and facility equipment — and they back us with dealer-level support.
partners.intro: Every product we sell comes with service behind it. By partnering with the category leaders, we can offer authorised dealer pricing, warranty handling, and technical support directly from the manufacturer.
partners.criteriaBody: We only add a brand to our range when we are confident in its quality, supply reliability, and after-sales support. Our buyers test products in our own workshop before they go into the catalogue.
partners.coverageBody: Fast lead times, warranty handling in-house, technical hotlines to the manufacturer, and access to stock we do not list publicly. If you need something a brand makes, ask us — we can almost always source it.

careers.heading: Work at SWR.
careers.subheading: A family-run business in its third generation, offering stable work, apprenticeships, and a team that actually knows each other's names.
careers.intro: We build long careers. Many of our team have been with the company for a decade or more — because we invest in people, not just payroll. If you are looking for stable, skilled work in the Lörrach area, we would like to hear from you.
careers.whyUsBody: Predictable hours, competitive pay, and real responsibility from day one. Small company, flat hierarchy, no politics — if you can do the work, we give you the space to do it.
careers.apprenticeshipBody: We train every year in commercial and warehouse roles. Our apprentices learn every part of the business — from product to customer to ERP — and most of them stay with us after qualifying.
careers.openRolesBody: Even if we have not advertised a specific opening, we are always interested in talking to skilled warehouse, sales, and counter staff. Send us a CV and we will reply.
careers.applicationBody: Send us a short CV and a few lines about yourself. We reply to every application.
careers.applicationHint: You do not need a polished cover letter — we care more about who you are and what you have worked on.

certificates.heading: Certifications and compliance.
certificates.subheading: Quality, environmental, customs, and welding certifications — available on request for your own supplier audits.
certificates.intro: As a B2B supplier, we maintain the certifications our customers need for their own quality and compliance processes. All current certificates are available on request — and we send them directly to your buyer or QA contact.
certificates.requestNote: Certificate PDFs are issued on request so we can always send you the current, signed version. Contact us and we will email the document you need within one working day.

offers.heading: Current offers and promotions.
offers.subheading: Seasonal promotions, end-of-range deals, and clearance — for existing customers and new buyers alike.
offers.intro: We run focused promotions rather than constant sales. If it is listed here, there is a real reason — a manufacturer campaign, a closing size range, or a volume deal we have negotiated on your behalf.
offers.howBody: Most offers apply to existing B2B customers automatically at checkout. For larger volumes or custom bundles, contact your account manager or the sales team — we can often improve on the listed price when quantity makes sense.
offers.emptyState: No active promotions right now — check back soon or contact us for custom pricing on larger orders.
